name: blofin-mcp
description: MCP server for BloFin exchange API - market data, trading, account management
long_description: Connect Claude to BloFin cryptocurrency exchange. Access real-time market data, manage your futures account, place and cancel orders, set take-profit/stop-loss, and track trade history — all through natural language.

tools.name: get_instruments
tools.description: Get available trading instruments. Returns contract specifications including min size, tick size, leverage limits.

tools.name: get_tickers
tools.description: Get latest price snapshot, best bid/ask, and 24h trading volume for instruments.

tools.name: get_orderbook
tools.description: Get order book depth for an instrument.

tools.name: get_trades
tools.description: Get recent trades for an instrument.

tools.name: get_mark_price
tools.description: Get mark price and index price for instruments.

tools.name: get_candlesticks
tools.description: Get candlestick/kline data for an instrument.

tools.name: get_funding_rate
tools.description: Get current funding rate for instruments.

tools.name: get_funding_rate_history
tools.description: Get historical funding rate data.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get futures account balance details including equity, available balance, frozen amounts.

tools.name: get_positions
tools.description: Get current open positions.

tools.name: get_leverage_info
tools.description: Get leverage info for an instrument.

tools.name: set_leverage
tools.description: Set leverage for an instrument.

tools.name: get_margin_mode
tools.description: Get current account-level margin mode (cross or isolated).

tools.name: set_margin_mode
tools.description: Set account-level margin mode.

tools.name: get_position_mode
tools.description: Get current position mode (long_short_mode or net_mode).

tools.name: set_position_mode
tools.description: Set position mode.

tools.name: get_account_config
tools.description: Get account configuration including position mode, account level, etc.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Place a new futures order. Supports limit, market, post_only, fok, ioc order types.

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel an existing order.

tools.name: batch_orders
tools.description: Place multiple orders at once (up to 20). All must share same instId and marginMode.

tools.name: cancel_batch_orders
tools.description: Cancel multiple orders at once.

tools.name: close_position
tools.description: Close a position for an instrument via a market order.

tools.name: get_open_orders
tools.description: Get list of currently open/pending orders.

tools.name: get_order_history
tools.description: Get order history.

tools.name: get_order_detail
tools.description: Get details of a specific order.

tools.name: get_fills_history
tools.description: Get trade fill history for futures.

tools.name: place_tpsl
tools.description: Place take-profit/stop-loss order for a position.

tools.name: cancel_tpsl
tools.description: Cancel take-profit/stop-loss orders.

tools.name: get_pending_tpsl
tools.description: Get pending take-profit/stop-loss orders.

tools.name: get_tpsl_history
tools.description: Get take-profit/stop-loss order history.

tools.name: place_algo_order
tools.description: Place an algo order (trigger order).

tools.name: cancel_algo_order
tools.description: Cancel an algo order.

tools.name: get_pending_algo_orders
tools.description: Get pending algo orders.

tools.name: get_algo_order_history
tools.description: Get algo order history.

tools.name: get_asset_balances
tools.description: Get asset balances across different account types.

tools.name: fund_transfer
tools.description: Transfer funds between accounts.

tools.name: get_fund_transfer_history
tools.description: Get fund transfer history between accounts.

tools.name: get_deposit_history
tools.description: Get deposit history.

tools.name: get_withdrawal_history
tools.description: Get withdrawal history.

tools.name: get_apikey_info
tools.description: Get API key information including permissions, IP whitelist, and expiration.
